rule php_shell_U34

	meta:

		date = "2017/01/25"
		hash = "5be3b1bc76677a70553a66575f289a0a"

	strings:
		$a = "'\".((strpos(@$_POST['"
		$b = "'],\"\\n\")!==false)?'':htmlspecialchars(@$_POST['"
		$c = "'],ENT_QUOTES)).\"';"

	condition:
